_note: Auto-managed by the agent. Never edit manually.

_schema.validation: On session start: confirm JSON is valid and all frame entries match this schema. Before any write: copy current file to figma-map.backup.json.

pages._note: Agent populates after page discovery. Designer confirms working page.

flows._note: Agent adds flow entries here as they are designed.

_format.name: flow name
_format.wireframe_location: Figma page or section where wireframes live
_format.hifi_location: Figma page or section where hi-fi lives — populated in Step 3.5

frames.label: screen label
frames.wireframe_node_id: node ID of the wireframe frame
frames.hifi_node_id: node ID of the hi-fi frame — populated during hi-fi phase

status_key.todo: Not started — no Figma frame exists
